---
title: "Class Support Checklist"
author: "John Gracey"
date: "2025-10-26"
output: html_document
---

We can use the following checklist as a framework for dissecting and recompiling a geometric method to fit into **ordr**.

* [ ] Verify the conference of inertia (i.e. distribution of variance) based on decomposition.
* [ ] Write recovery functions of decomposition elements.
* [ ] Validate recovery with comparison to existing methods in **ordr** or matrix algebra corresponding to decomposition.
* [ ] Write augmentation functions to generate `tbl_ord` objects.
* [ ] Write a "methods" script containing all recovery and augmentation functions.
* [ ] Write an "examples" script using the new methods.
* [ ] Write a unit test script using the new methods.
* [ ] Generate documentation using `devtools::document()`.
* [ ] Submit the files and documentation in a pull request to **ordr.extra**.
